Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction/:
bigDrums
                    /10 16
                    /farmer 7 8 2
                    /addTemporaryActor 7A.Ebony 32 32 12 10 1 false Character
                    /changeName 7A.Ebony Ebony
                    /setSkipActions AddItem (O){{ModID}}_EbonyCharm#AddItem (O)ButterflyPowder#mushymato.LivestockBazaar_AdoptPet 7A.Ebony 0 Ebony#AddMail Current CnC_AdoptedEbony
                    /skippable
                    /pause 500

                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12 true
                    /playSound crow
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 35
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /shake 7A.Ebony 800
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 36
                    /animate 7A.Ebony false true 70 4 5 6 7
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Bah... blast this rubble to bits!$s#$b#Let me in you unruly sticks, or I'll make you regret it!$a"
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12 true
                    /playSound crow
                    /pause 300
                    /playSound stoneCrack
                    /pause 600
                    /playSound weed_cut
                    /pause 400
                    /advancedMove farmer false 0 2 2 0 1 10
                    /pause 400
                    /playSound stoneCrack
                    /pause 300
                    /playSound weed_cut
                    /pause 400
                    /playSound stoneCrack
                    /waitForAllStationary
                    /emote farmer 8
                    /pause 50
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 16 true
                    /pause 200
                    /stopAnimation 7A.Ebony
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 14
                    /pause 100
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 16 true
                    /playSound crow
                    /shake 7A.Ebony 3000
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 39
                    /jump 7A.Ebony 
                    /pause 700
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Ah! Who goes there!$u"
                    /pause 200
                    /shake 7A.Ebony 500
                        /textAboveHead 7A.Ebony "CAW!!!"
                    /playSound crow
                    /stopAnimation 7A.Ebony 14
                    /pause 1200
                    /speed 7A.Ebony 4
                    /advancedMove 7A.Ebony false -2 0 3 10
                    /waitForAllStationary
                    /playSound crow
                    /shake 7A.Ebony 1000
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 39
                    /jump 7A.Ebony 
                    /pause 700
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 38
                    /pause 500
                    /animate 7A.Ebony true true 70 4 5 6 7
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12
                    /pause 500
                    /advancedMove farmer false -1 0 1 10
                    /emote farmer 28
                    /pause 100
                    /stopAnimation 7A.Ebony 14
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 40
                    /pause 300
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 16 true
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 38
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /playSound crow
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 39
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 14
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Wait just a moment, you're crow-friend! You actually came!$l#$b#And it seems you can understand me. Brilliant!#$b#(What is that old man feeding people these days...?$s)"/
			                showFrame 7A.Ebony 12/		    
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
                            showFrame 7A.Ebony 13/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
   			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
                            showFrame 7A.Ebony 14/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
                            showFrame 7A.Ebony 15/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony 4 0/ pause 5/
                            showFrame 7A.Ebony 12/
                            pause 5
                    /warp 7A.Ebony 11 10
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "My most sincere apologies for my outburst.#$b#You can never be too careful down here...$s"/
                    /faceDirection 7A.Ebony 1
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "My name is Ebony Ravenway, friend of Rasmodius.#$b#Step forward with me, if you will.$s"/
                    /pause 100
                    /speed 7A.Ebony 1
                    /advancedMove 7A.Ebony false 1 0 1 10
                    /pause 200
                    /advancedMove farmer false 2 0 0 1 2 0 1 10
                    /waitForAllStationary
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 40
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "You see... there's a horrid beast at the depths of these caverns - Novus Corvus.#$b#It captured countless crows and sapped away their life force...$s#$b#It turned them into mere husks - pawns for whatever evil plan it was scheming.$a"/
                    /faceDirection 7A.Ebony 2
                    /pause 50
                    /faceDirection farmer 0
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Fortunately, Rasmodius was able to seal it and its undead army away before he could cause any more harm...$s#$b#Unfortunately, my dearest husband thought he could rescue all those poor crows!$a"
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 33
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12 true
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 0
                    /pause 300
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "He's been missing for several moons now... I'm growing worried something has happened to him.$s"
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 33
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12 true
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 0
                    /pause 800
                    /emote farmer 28 
                    /pause 300
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "I can't even get past this debris covering the entrance on my own...$a#$b#Aaand that's why you've been called here!$l"
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 40
                    /unskippable
                        /quickQuestion So, will you help me?#Of course, let's get a move on!#Not my circus, not my monkeys.
                        (break)switchEvent {{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction.C1(break)switchEvent {{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction.C2
                    /end
Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction.C1:
pause 1
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 20 true
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 33
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12 true
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 0
                    /pause 300
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Wonderful, brilliant! I am forever in your debt!$h#$b#Thank you so, so very much!$l"/
                        /switchEvent {{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction_Cont.1/pause 1
                    /end
Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction.C2:
pause 1
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12 true
                    /playSound crow
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 33
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 0
                    /pause 300
                    /action AddMail Current CnC_RefusedToHelp
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Well that's just too darn bad I'm afraid!$h#$b#You're going to, as I have a reward that would otherwise prevent you from reaching perfection!$a"/
                        /switchEvent {{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction_Cont.1/pause 1
                    /end
Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction_Cont.1:
pause 1
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 40
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Now that we have that settled... I of course would not send you into those dangerous catacombs alone!#$b#Take this charm. You can use it to summon me at will."/
                        /action AddItem (O){{ModID}}_EbonyCharm
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 33
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 0
                    /pause 300
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Furthermore... to make things simpler for the both of us, would you be opposed to me staying on your farm?"/
                    /emote farmer 40
                        /quickQuestion Adopt Ebony as a pet?#Of course!#Not a chance.
                        (break)switchEvent {{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction.C3(break)switchEvent {{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction.C4
Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction.C3:
pause 1
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 20
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Thank you! It will be nice to have a place to rest my weary head again.$l#$b#My nest fell into disarray after Darkiepoo disappeared...$s#$b#I promise I won't cause you any problems.$h#$b#Well, too many, at least.$l"/
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 20 true
                    /playSound crow
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 33
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 0
                    /pause 300
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "May the wind be with you! I shall fly to your side as you need me.$h"/
                    /action mushymato.LivestockBazaar_AdoptPet 7A.Ebony 0 Ebony
                    /emote farmer 32
                    /pause 500
                    /end
Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBIntroduction.C4:
pause 1
                    /action AddMail Current CnC_DidNotAdoptEbony
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 28 true
                    /pause 200
                    /faceDirection 7A.Ebony 1
                    /pause 300
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "I... see. Noted. I will lie in wait among the forest trees.$s"/
                    /faceDirection 7A.Ebony 2
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "May the wind be with you. I shall fly to your side as you need me.$s"/
                    /emote farmer 60
                    /pause 500
                    /end
